description_long: This armchair features a rounded, tufted backrest and seat, upholstered in a dark charcoal fabric with a subtle woven texture. The backrest is gently curved and button-tufted, providing both visual interest and ergonomic support. The seat is generously padded and also tufted, creating a plush and inviting appearance. The chair stands on four turned wooden legs with a natural finish, adding a classic touch to its overall design. There are no visible armrests, giving the chair an open and accessible profile. The overall style is elegant yet understated, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A dark, tufted, armless armchair with a rounded back and turned wooden legs, upholstered in charcoal fabric.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, button-tufted backrest and seat, with no armrests and two visible wooden legs.
description_view_1: Front-side view highlights the chair's curved backrest, plush seat, and the profile of the turned wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded backrest and the back pair of wooden legs, with no visible tufting.
description_view_3: Back-side view reveals the chair's continuous upholstery, curved back, and the side profile of the seat and legs.
